title: Impact of Apolipoprotein E Genotype on Neurocognitive Function in Patients with Brain Metastases: An Analysis of NRG Oncology's RTOG 0614.
reconciliation_notes: Brain metastases/oncology study; memantine used but primary focus is neurocognitive function in cancer patients, not mental disorder.

title: Comparative Efficacy of Augmenting Escitalopram with Modified Electroconvulsive Therapy or High-Frequency Repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation on Depressive Symptoms...
reconciliation_notes: No Canadian sites indicated; ESC combined with MECT/rTMS for TRD; not purely pharmacological comparison.

title: In-person cognitive behavioural therapy vs. usual care after surgical management of extremity fractures: an unsuccessful feasibility trial.
reconciliation_notes: Non-pharmacological (CBT); targets post-surgical pain not mental disorder; Canadian but failed feasibility pilot.

title: Multimodal imaging measures in the prediction of clinical response to deep brain stimulation for refractory depression: A machine learning approach.
reconciliation_notes: DBS (neurostimulation), not pharmacological; machine learning prediction study on existing trial data.

title: Mutual Aid Groups for Loneliness, Psychosocial Disability, and Continuity of Care.
reconciliation_notes: Quasi-experimental, non-randomized; non-pharmacological (mutual help groups); Colombian context.

title: Effects of Online Mindful Somatic Psychoeducation Program on Mental Health During the COVID-19.
reconciliation_notes: Non-pharmacological (psychoeducation program); Korean university students; no pharmacological intervention.

title: IL-1 Blockade Mitigates Autism and Cerebral Palsy Traits in Offspring In-Utero Exposed to Group B Streptococcus Chorioamnionitis.
reconciliation_notes: Animal study (Lewis rat model); not a human clinical trial.

title: Optimizing the Better Nights, Better Days for Children with Neurodevelopmental Disorders program for large scale implementation.
reconciliation_notes: Non-pharmacological (eHealth behavioral sleep intervention); Canadian but qualitative optimization study, not pharmacological RCT.
